title: Limited Granulomatosis With Polyangiitis Presenting as Lung Nodules
description: A 60-year-old woman with rheumatoid arthritis presented with dyspnea, pleuritic chest pain, and FDG-avid pulmonary nodules after failing azithromycin for presumed bronchitis. Biopsy and serologies supported limited granulomatosis with polyangiitis. This case stresses pulmonary vasculitis vs infection reasoning plus medication normalization on a multi-drug outpatient regimen from the AGBonnet augmented-clinical-notes dataset (idx 90861; conversation and full_note columns).
notes: Derived from dataset row idx 90861. The original dataset row is copied into case_05_source.json. All patient data comes from the synthetic augmented-clinical-notes dataset.
